commands.title: Discord setup guide
commands.description: How to create a bot, enable intents, invite it, and set DISCORD_TOKEN.

panels.title: Discord MCP
panels.body:
## Discord package

1. Create an application at https://discord.com/developers/applications
2. Bot → Reset Token → copy **DISCORD_TOKEN**
3. Enable **Message Content Intent** (and others you need) under Privileged Gateway Intents
4. OAuth2 → URL Generator: scopes `bot`, invite the bot to your server
5. After install, set the token in global config:

```toml
[[mcp.servers]]
id = "discord"
# ...
[mcp.servers.env]
DISCORD_TOKEN = "your-bot-token"
```

6. Restart NAVI / reload MCP. Tools appear with prefix `discord`.

MCP server: `npx -y @iqai/mcp-discord` (requires Node.js 18+).
